name: Creamy Vegetable Soup C/p
recipeIngredient: 3 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and chopped
2 quarts chicken stock or 2 quarts vegetable broth
1 can creamed corn or 3/4 cup fresh corn kernels
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the cream in a 4 to 5 quart crockpot.
2. Cook on low setting for 6 to 8 hours, or until sweet potatoes are tender.
3. Ten minutes before serving, add the cream if using and stir gently.
4. Heat through and serve.
